content.en:
"Invincible people of the Heavenly Wind Sea, you can't go!"

An invincible person descended on this exotic world and surrounded Ye Tian and the others.

At the same time, an invincible person sacrificed a special treasure, instantly sealing the void of the entire exotic world, even if Ye Tian and the others wanted to tear apart the exotic world and go to other exotic worlds, it would be difficult to do it.

"Eighteen fourth-class invincibles, one third-class invincible!"

Ye Tian was a little dignified.

Although the third-class invincible will be suppressed by the foreign world by more than ninety percent of the strength, which is more than the strength suppressed by the fourth-class invincible in the foreign world, the third-class invincible is very strong in itself, even if it is suppressed ruthlessly, it is still much stronger than the fourth-class invincible.

In addition, there are eighteen fourth-rank invincibles here, and maybe more invincibles will come at any time, so they are in an extremely dangerous situation, and if they are not careful, they will be completely annihilated.

"Who are you and why are you dealing with us?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Hahaha, it seems that you don't know anything, we are the invincible of the Netherworld, you Tianfeng Sea has offended the Netherworld, otherwise why do you think Tianfenghai only sent you to carry out the mission?"

It's the Nether Temple!

Ye Tian and the others were shocked, and even a few invincible people were even more terrified.

They don't have the ability of Ye Tian, they only have a body, and once they fall, they will really fall.

Although Qingyang Supreme had said that this mission was extremely dangerous before, they felt that Qingyang Supreme was more of an exaggeration, and if they were lucky, it was not necessarily dangerous.

But now that they learned that they had offended the Netherworld, they immediately regretted it.

The Netherworld Temple is one of the eight eternal name-level forces in the Tianlin Realm, although it is the last in the ranking, it is still an eternal name-level force, with the existence of the supreme being.

And Tianfeng Sea is only a saint-level force, and the strongest is only a first-class invincible.

"I surrender!"

An invincible person in the Heavenly Wind Sea hurriedly said.

"Yes, as long as you kill the others, you can submit to our Nether Temple!"

The third-class invincible of the Netherworld Temple promised.

But in fact, he didn't plan to let go of any of the invincible people of Tianfeng Sea at all, because an order was issued from above to kill them all and leave no one behind.

If there are invincible people who pretend to surrender and continue their mission in secret, aren't they being tricked?

To avoid this, they will not spare the lives of any of the invincibles.

The other nine invincible people of the Heavenly Wind Sea were not stupid, and they did not believe the words of the third-rank invincibles of the Netherworld Temple.

"Let's break through!"

After Ye Tian made eye contact with the others, he decided.

Although in terms of strength, he far surpasses the average fourth-rank invincible, and even the third-rank invincible of Tianfeng Sea, it is estimated that there are few opponents for him.

However, this time, the opponent is the Netherworld Hall of the Eternal Name-level Forces, and the fourth-rank invincible of the Eternal Name-level forces must have an invincible person who is even stronger than him, maybe the third-rank invincible is very strong, and they still have support, and Tianfeng Hai is afraid that there is no support.

Therefore, he didn't want to delay, and he didn't want to show his strength, he just wanted to escape as soon as possible.

Bang!!!!

The fight has begun!

Everyone had a box, and Ye Tian also broke through with a box and left, and three fourth-class invincible people besieged him.

Ye Tian only showed a part of his strength, blocking the attacks of the three fourth-rank invincibles, and immediately tried to break the void blockade, although it was very slow, but there was hope to break it.

The other invincibles were miserable, and in a short time, a fourth-rank invincible person of the Heavenly Wind Sea died at the hands of that third-rank invincible.

That's when it happened.

Tear and pull!

The void was torn apart, leading to another exotic world.

The invincible people of the Netherworld Temple looked at Ye Tian incredulously, obviously not expecting Ye Tian to break the blockade so quickly.

"Stop him!"

The third-class invincible came to kill Ye Tian in person, but he was obviously one step too late.

Ye Tian hit the three fourth-rank invincibles with one blow, and after no one stopped them, he turned into a ray of light and escaped into another exotic world, and immediately broke the exotic world again at the fastest speed, heading to another exotic world.

Soon, Ye Tian got rid of those invincible people in the Netherworld Temple.

......

"Captain Qingzi, ran three invincibles!"

The fourth-rank invincible of the Netherworld Hall reported to the third-rank invincible Qingzi.

Qingzi was also a little annoyed, his strength was not bad among the third-class invincibles in the third-class Netherworld Temple, although he came to the foreign world and his strength was suppressed, but he led so many fourth-class invincibles to intercept a team of ten fourth-class invincibles, but he didn't expect them to run three people.

"It's all to blame on that man!"

Qingzi thought of Ye Tian, if he hadn't gone after Ye Tian, he wouldn't have let the two fourth-rank invincibles take the opportunity to escape.

However, he had to admit that Ye Tian's strength was indeed very strong, perhaps not much weaker than him.

It's a pity that the other party escaped too fast, and he couldn't lock the position in a short time, otherwise he would invite some third-class invincibles to ensure that he could kill the other party.

Next, Ye Tian was more careful and went on the road alone.

He didn't know if the others had survived, but even if someone did, it would be impossible for him to gather with the other party, what if it was a trap?

As a result, he had to carry out the task alone.

Of course, he can also give up this task, but if he gives up, he is afraid that there will be punishment when he returns to Tianfeng Hai, when Tianfeng Hai has not been destroyed by the Netherworld Temple, Tianfeng Hai is indeed a big backer.

Moreover, he felt that Tianfeng Hai was not hopeless to survive the crisis, otherwise there would not be this mission, and the Netherworld Temple was probably very afraid of Tianfeng Hai, otherwise he would not have sent so many invincible people to stop Tianfeng Hai's mission.

Time passes slowly –

Ye Tian relied on his strong strength, coupled with a certain amount of luck, and finally managed to approach the destination.

The last exotic world away from his destination, Ye Tian came here.

As soon as he came here, he was still a little panicked, because there were many invincibles here, and he thought that he was surrounded by the invincibles of the Netherworld, but he soon found out that this was not the case.

There are huge cities here, there are many invincible people in and out of here, third-class invincibles and even second-class invincibles can be seen, and fourth-class invincibles like Ye Tian are undoubtedly at the bottom here.

Ye Tian entered a city called Guyuan City.

"Team up and go to the Yuanji Abyss, designate the third-class invincible, and the invincibles below and above the third-class invincible don't come to join in the fun!" shouted a third-class invincible.

"The fourth-class invincibles have formed a team, the number of people is hundred, and they will enter the Yuanji Abyss when they are all together!"

Voices filled the heavens and the earth, and Ye Tian couldn't pay attention to it.

"Yuan Extreme Abyss!"

Ye Tian guessed that this Yuan Extreme Abyss should be the broken eternal world.

Subsequently, he made a general inquiry, and finally learned the information of the Yuanji Abyss.
